rationale: The cited paper is used only in grouped citations to motivate the broad managerial question of targeting influential users, and again in a brief limitations/future-work note. The citing paper does not adopt Trusov et al. (2010)'s Bayesian influence-identification method, measures, or empirical setup in building or validating its DSS. Its substantive modeling work relies on Bass-ABM, complex contagion, and GA calibration choices drawn from other sources. So this citation functions as background context rather than a direct conceptual or methodological input.
